name: Spinach Salad with Oranges
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, mix together lemon juice, curry powder, dry mustard, salt, Worcestershire sauce, and pepper.
2. Gradually add the olive oil while stirring with a fork or wire whisk.
3. Place garlic in a screw-top jar. Pour the dressing into the jar; cover and chill for several hours.
4. Wash spinach thoroughly. Drain and tear into bite-size pieces.
5. Place the spinach in a plastic bag; chill.
6. At serving time, place the spinach in a large salad bowl. Add the drained oranges.
7. Shake the dressing vigorously and pour about 1/3 cup over the salad. Toss to mix well. Reserve the remaining dressing for later use.
